title: Crispy Iberico Pork Belly Bites
description: A Spanish-inspired appetizer featuring crispy Iberico pork belly bites, served with a smoky aioli for dipping.
instructions: Cut the Iberico pork belly into 1-inch cubes.
Season the pork cubes with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Dip each pork cube into the beaten eggs and then coat in bread crumbs.
Heat a skillet with delicate olive oil over medium heat.
Add the coated pork cubes and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Transfer the pork cubes to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy.
Meanwhile, toast the bread crumbs in a dry skillet until lightly browned.
Serve the crispy Iberico pork belly bites with a side of toasted bread crumbs and a drizzle of smoky aioli for dipping.
